subject: Re:
body:
please call , we need to discuss a transition. 340 775 8111

----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, August 20, 2007 10:58:21 AM
Subject: 


Hello!
Wanted to check in to see how things are going for you?!  Much better I 
hope!!  Only I would get strept throat in mid summer!

When I'm not contagious and can speak I hope to sit and chat with you about 
everything going on and how I feel about it.  It is hard for me to say that 
to you knowing I can turn to you for help and advice when I need it but it 
honestly makes me feel uncomfortable after now having more knowledge what is 
going on and those around me are becoming more aware.  I've always been 
honest with you and I feel you and I have always had that kind of realtion 
and this is no different. Like I said, when I can talk and not make you sick 
i hope to sit down.  Are you in town this week?

Sending happy strong thoughts your way.

Cd

_________________________________________________________________
